meta.original_query: crée une page de vente landing page pour mon site de chaussur de sport

design_direction.rationale: Sports shoes require high visual appeal to showcase design combined with trust signals (reviews, tech specs) to justify performance claims. The layout balances product imagery with conversion elements using the provided professional style base.

typography.heading: Outfit
typography.scale: Large hero headings, clear body hierarchy

direction.stack_notes: Use Tailwind utility classes for responsive grid; optimize product images to WebP/AVIF for performance.
